ko: 우리 종족 전체에 대한 확신이 듭니다.

en: But anyway, let's talk about John, please.
If I burden myself with a little helpmate during my adventures, it is not out of sentiment or caprice.
ko: 모험 중에 작은 도우미를 두는 것은

en: It is that he has many fine qualities of his own that he has overlooked in his obsession with me.
Indeed, any reputation I have for mental acuity and sharpness comes in truth from the extraordinary
ko: 사실, 내가 지능과 날카로움으로 가진 평판은

en: contrast John so selflessly provides. It is a fact, I believe, that brides tend to favor exceptionally plain bridesmaids
for their big day. There is a certain analogy there, I feel.
And contrast is, after all, God's own plan to enhance the beauty of his creation.
ko: 신의 창조물의 아름다움을 향상시키기 위한 계획입니다.

en: Or it would be, if God were not a ludicrous fantasy designed to provide a career opportunity for the family idiot.
The point I'm trying to make is that I am the most unpleasant, rude, ignorant, and all-round
ko: 무례하며, 무지하고, 전반적으로 불쾌한 사람이라는 것입니다.
누군가가 만날 수 있는 불행일 수 있다.
